instructions.original_snippets: NEVER create context without scanning .context/session/in/ — source materials in the in-folder define the scope; a context built without them is speculative.
NEVER write a manifest without a session_id — unnamed sessions cannot be retrieved by load-context.
After EVERY AskUserQuestion call, check if answers are empty/blank — outside Plan Mode, AskUserQuestion silently returns empty answers without showing UI.
Use --force flag to overwrite an existing .context/session/ctx/ snapshot when source files have been updated.
NEVER include security-sensitive files from in-folder in the manifest without explicit user confirmation.
In-folder is immutable bootstrap — user dumps raw docs there, commands never modify it.
